dragon_species.dragonsurvival.wing_kirin:
§7■§6"The Kirin treads on auspicious clouds, dispelling all hardships in the mortal world."§r§7 The Kirin is one of the§6 Five Great Auspicious Beasts§r§7 from ancient mythology, born above the Nine Heavens, embodying the§a beautiful symbolism§r§7 of§6 "favorable weather and national peace".§r§7
■ The§6 Wing Kirin§7 is a kin with an additional pair of wings.§6 Its body is covered in golden scales, it treads on auspicious clouds, its form flows with the wind, and its crane-like wings hang from the sky. It dwells among the clouds and rainbows, bathed in the Qi of the Grand Purity; it harnesses the harsh winds as its chariot, roaming beyond the Eight Extremities.§r

§2■ Features: Attacks are powerful and forceful, abilities are grand and sweeping;It'§2s abilities are divided into innate and acquired,the latter, although expensive, has a strong effect.§r
§4■ Weakness: Difficulty entering the Nether.§r
§6■ Diet:§r§7 %s

§7■ You were born above the Nine Heavens, living and dining with the deities. Your diet§r§a isn't vastly different§r§7 from humans, whether it's berries and watermelon as snacks or the delicacies "found only in heaven," your stomach can§r§a handle them with ease§r§7.
■ The righteous energy between the sun, moon, heaven, and earth has also granted you the ability to perform§r§6 Heavenly Magic§r§7. Even if you only grasp the basics, dabbling without mastery, it's enough to§r§b "make the wolves, insects, tigers, and leopards have nowhere to hide"§r§7.

■ However, having§r§n descended to the mortal world for the first time§r§7, you have never witnessed the§r§4 demonic realms§r§7 outside the Overworld. Once you set foot in them, the§r§5 evil inversions§r§7 lurking there will§c seep into every pore§r§7 of your body, causing you§c immense pain§r§7, and you might even be possessed by evil spirits,§c severely damaging your vitality§r§7... But you cannot§n remain in a secluded corner§r§7, so you must§e make full preparations§r§7 before leaving the Overworld.
dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.stasis_hex:
§7■ When cast §f[standing]§r§7, shoots an extremely fast§6「Stasis Arrow」§r§7 that instantly§6 immobilizes§r§7 the hit entity in place (including in mid-air), making it§c unable to move§r§7.
■ When cast §f[sneaking]§r§7,the「Stasis Arrow」changes to§6「Area Trigger」§r§7, displaying particles on the ground to§n mark the approximate range§r§7.

■ The duration of「Projectile Stasis」increases with§a ability level (experience level)§r§7; the radius of「Area Stasis」also increases with skill level,§e but the stasis duration remains constant§r§7.

■Can §a superpose duration§r§n with count and duration restriction.§r§7If a entity was given §6「Ding Shen」§r§7potion effect which §nexceeds 50 seconds§r§7,that will cause this entity§a suffer 50%%§a damage bonus§r§7 when duration §nexceeds 50 seconds!§r

■§c⚠: Not all creatures can be immobilized!§r

§6§o"...Even using this Body Binding Spell, immobilizing the two wolf-headed spirits. Staring wide-eyed, unable to speak; standing stiffly, feet rooted."§r
dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.uppersky_w:
§7■ Draws down the§6「Harsh Winds」§r§7 from above the Nine Heavens, controlling them to transform into the§6「Uppersky Wind Breath」§r§7, §ebypassing any armor§r§7 ,blowing enemies caught in the breath until they are§e separated from spirit and form, unable to resist!§r

§7■ The force increases with §aability level(experience level).§r §8

■ Can only be used in the§n Overworld§r§8(Except having §r「Great Zhengqi」§8 effect).§r

§6§o"The wild horses, the dust, all living things blowing each other with their breath."§r

Upon landing, it's like a meteorite falling from the sky, causing§e considerable damage§r§7 to creatures struck by the warhammer.

dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.weather_cl:
■ The§6 Wing Kirin§r§7 dislikes§9 summoning wind and rain§r§7, preferring§a clear skies§r§7. Casting this magic disperses the heavy clouds, restoring the§3 blue sky§r§7.

dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.thunderous:
§7■ Take a deep breath, then fully mobilize the energy from your dantian, releasing it all in an instant in the form of§6 Sonic Boom§r§7, like a sudden thunderclap heard for miles, causing enemies to be§e terrified, their courage shattered§r§7, while simultaneously shattering fragile blocks, making some cover§e vanish into dust!§r§7

■ If you have the§6「Golden Bell」§r§7 artifact, you can concentrate the sound energy,§a greatly increasing the power§r§7, creating a§e crushing force§r§7.

§e■ Due to the immense internal energy required, it has a§n duration limit§r§e, which increases with§a ability level(growth level)§r§e.§7

§7■ Fully mobilize, even§c exceed your own mana limit§r§7, to summon an extremely fast§6「Guided Missle」§r§7 that crashes down where you are looking, letting enemies taste the flavor of§6「Truth」§r§7!

dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.instant_in:
§7■ Upon use, perform a brief spell in your claw, immediately become a§6「Invisibility 」§r§7, while reducing§e physical pain§r§7 suffered (such as player attack,projectile and so on).

§7■ Above the§n cloud layers§r flows the§6 essence of the sun, moon, heaven, and earth§r§7. Please§n hold an empty glass bottle under the bright moonlight§r§7 and cast this magic to concentrate it into a bottle of§6「Empyrean Wine」§r§7.

A rain of§r§6 arrows§r§8§m (Storm of Pear Blossom Needles)§r§7 will fall from the sky onto your location, landing within the§n approximate range marked by particles during charging§r§7, turning any attacking enemies into pincushions!

dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.born_above:

dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.empyrean_m:
§7■ The atmosphere above the cloud layers is filled with§6「Heavenly Magic Energy」§r. The§6 Wing Kirin§r§7 bathed in it can§a rapidly recover mana§r§7.

§7■ If the§n mainhand is holding§r§6「Golden Bell」§r§7, the emitted sound wave energy can be§a greatly concentrated§r,§a doubling§r§7 the power of the§6「Thunderous Shout」§r§7!

dragon_ability.dragonsurvival.empyrean_f:
§7■ As the saying goes: "Three parts are destined by heaven." Born above the Nine Heavens, the§6 Winged Kirin§r§7 is naturally§a deeply favored by Heaven§r.§7 In§n loot scenarios§r§7 like fishing, it can find items of§a superior quality§r§7.

§7■ The Wing Kirin was born above the Nine Heavens of the Overworld and has never been exposed to the§c evil inversions§r§7 of other dimensions. When stepping into other dimensions, the lingering§5 Evil Qi§r§7 will erode the§6 Zheng Qi§r§7 within the body. If not distanced from the trouble in time, the Zheng Qi will be§c completely eroded§r§7, and the primordial spirit within will be drained, making you emaciated and vulnerable.

■ By consuming items that containing§6「Empyrean Wine」§r§7 or obtaining the§6「Great Zhengqi」§r§7 effect from the Dragon Beacon, you can stabilize the§6 Zheng Qi§r§7 within, temporarily§a keeping the Evil Qi at bay§r.

dragon_species.dragonsurvival.wing_kirin:
§7■ After mastering§n all passive ability§r§7 of the official three dragons , reaching the§n Ancient stage§r§7 with all of them, and completing the dietary challenges for all three dragon types, Heaven will verify your cultivation near the limit of constcuction in the Overworld:

1. Whether experience has reached§a Level 68§r§7; 2. Whether carrying§6 2 or more Netherite Blocks§r§7 (not consumed).

If all the above conditions are met, when the§n weather is clear§r§7, you can transform into the Auspicious Beast — the§6 Wing Kirin.§r

§7■ If you enabled the datapack §a「Low Unlock Condition - Wing Kirin」§r§7,there will only requires §nposition and weather.§r
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/be: Undergo multiple trials to become a Wing Kirin.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/ma: Fully master the Wing Kirin's passive abilities.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/gr: Obtain the 'Great ZhengQi' effect from the Dragon Beacon, allowing you to leave the Overworld without constant fear.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/we: Use the 'Clearing Skies' ability to disperse the dark clouds and restore the blue sky.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/th: Collect the essence of heaven, earth, sun, and moon with an empty glass bottle above the clouds under the bright moonlight to obtain this bottle of celestial dew.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/he: After eating this delicacy, you instantly feel a great increase in mana, casting freely!
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/di: Use the 'Stasis Hex' to press the "death acupoint" on your opponent, rendering them immobile, "I am the knife, they are the fish on the chopping block."
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/fa: Fire a 'Signal Arrow' into the sky, letting enemies experience what it means to be "pierced by ten thousand arrows."
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/ov: Deal 250 hearts of damage in a single hit using the Mace as Wing Kirin.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/fl: Fly to the highet at 999 blocks, deeply comprehending Su Shi's "I ride the wind to return."
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/de: When your number's up, your number's up,only temporarily rescheduled.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/be: Gain level 108 growth as a Wing Kirin.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/pe: Obtain all 「Acquired Ability」 by eating 「Hearting connecting to Memories」.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/in: Healing at least 3 alies by your 「Invincible Benevolence」 Once, Resistance on you, you are invincible.
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/br: Striking entity with 「Instant Invisibility」,tell them: "I am everywhere."
dragonsurvival.advancement.wing_kirin/in: Counter Shock more than 10 times in single casting 「Indestructible Body」, making their attacking invalid.
item.wing_kirin.wing_kirin_treat.descrip: §7■ After mixing Golden Wind, Jade Dew with Dragon Dust, although the Absorption effect is lost due to neutralization, it grants the Wing Kirin infinite mana temporarily.
item.wing_kirin.empyrean_wine.descriptio: §7■ Concentrates the essence of heaven, earth, sun, and moon. It is a delicacy unseen in the mortal world for any creature; a single bottle is enough to heal ordinary injuries. For the Wing Kirin, it is a great tonic, also providing effect of Absorption.
§6§o"When the Golden Wind meets the Jade Dew, it surpasses all countless moments in the mortal world."
item.wing_kirin.golden_bell.description_: §7■ Different from ordinary bells, this bell has an opening, seemingly usable as a loudspeaker.
item.wing_kirin.wing_kirin_upgrade.descr: §7■ Gathers essences into one. Using it allows you to acquire innate abilities you didn't originally possess.
§7■§a Seventy percent§r§7 chance to gain§a experience and other award§r§7,§6 thirty percent§r§7 chance to gain one of the§6 five powerful acquired abilities§r§7.

fml.menu.mods.info.description.wing_kiri: An addon for Dragon Survival,adding an new species————Wing Kirin,a kind of Chinese auspicious beasts from Nine-Layered Heaven.
